name: cloudgrid
description: Deploy web apps, APIs, and sites to CloudGrid. Full local MCP with 33 tools — orient, fetch, drop, deploy, manage, and more.
long_description: CloudGrid MCP gives Claude Desktop the full CloudGrid toolset: instant drops (live preview URLs), production deploys, logs, rollbacks, environment variables, secrets, and more — all without leaving the conversation. The extension bundles everything; no terminal, no Node, no JSON config.
